sql.title: SQL for Beginners
sql.description: Learn SQL from zero with hands-on practice.
sql.moreComingSoon: More SQL for Beginners lessons are coming soon.

sql_module_12.title: Updating and Deleting Data
sql_module_12.description: Teach safe data changes and the habit of previewing before modifying records.
outcomes: Preview affected rows before running changes.
Adopt safe habits that prevent accidental data loss.
why: Builds confidence with updating and deleting data.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

section_12_1.title: Updating Rows
section_12_1.description: Learn how UPDATE changes existing rows and why WHERE is critical before making changes.

section_12_2.title: Deleting Rows
section_12_2.description: Use DELETE carefully by selecting target rows first and avoiding accidental full-table deletion.

section_12_3.title: Data Safety Mindset
section_12_3.description: Build safe habits for previewing, backing up, and thinking before changing data.

section_12_4.title: Practice with Data Changes
section_12_4.description: Practice updating prices, changing statuses, deleting test rows, and following a safe modification workflow.
